name: tracedecay
description: Codex integration for the TraceDecay semantic code intelligence MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic code intelligence and memory for Codex.
interface.longDescription: TraceDecay adds a code graph MCP server and Codex skills for cheap code reading, impact analysis, project memory, and context-saving workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use TraceDecay when you need to inspect code, map dependencies, estimate impact, recall prior project context, or reduce repeated file reads.
